title: braya americana
intro: Braya americana, also known as American rock cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Braya americana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Braya americana can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in salves and creams, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
